code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut out = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        mut c = b
        if b >= 65 and b <= 90
          c = b + 32
        else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
          c = b - 32
        end
        out = "#{out}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      when None
        i = n
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
